case_title: HYORA, HEIDI VS RUIMY, GEORGE IND/DBA GLAMOUR JEWELRY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $130.20 FILED BY HYORA, HEIDI AS TO DEFENDANT RUIMY, GEORGE IND/DBA GLAMOUR JEWELRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RUIMY, GEORGE IND/DBA GLAMOUR JEWELRY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HYORA, HEIDI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RUIMY, GEORGE IND/DBA GLAMOUR JEWELRY DEFENDANT TO REPAIR BRACELET AT NO CHARGE TO PLAINTIFF IF PLAINTIFF BRINGS BRACELET BY 1/30/98. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
